name: SchemaDriftDetector

neutralConcepts: IR-1: drift threshold from FREEDOM config (flow14_schema_drift_quarantine_threshold, default 0.3)
IR-2: SchemaDriftDetected emitted only when driftScore > threshold
First schema for connector stored as baseline — driftScore=0 returned
approve() stores new schema version BEFORE emitting SchemaApproved — DNA-8

ironRules.rule: Drift threshold MUST come from FREEDOM config (flow14_schema_drift_quarantine_threshold).
SchemaDriftDetected emitted ONLY when driftScore > threshold.
approve() stores schema version BEFORE emitting SchemaApproved — DNA-8.

keywords: schema drift detector freedom config threshold drift score SchemaDriftDetected SchemaApproved approve pipeline paused baseline version
